Tests the `typeof` operator with various data types and values in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a test suite that verifies the behavior of the JavaScript `typeof` operator. It defines a simple function [`f`](<#pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry/typeoff>) that returns the number `1`. The code then uses assertions to check the `typeof` results for various data types and values, including `undefined`, `null`, `boolean`, `number`, `string`, `object`, and `function`. Each `assert` statement confirms that the `typeof` operator returns the expected string representation for each tested value. This script provides narrow functionality focused on validating the correct operation of the `typeof` operator in JavaScript.
# Functions
